flags.label: Hatch New Assistant
flags.description: Show Hatch New Assistant action in Settings > Account

flags.label: Guardian Verification Setup
flags.description: Enable guardian verification routing in the system prompt

flags.label: Browser
flags.description: Enable browser skill prerequisites section in the system prompt

flags.label: Collect usage data
flags.description: Send crash reports, error diagnostics, and anonymized usage telemetry to help improve the app

flags.label: Contacts
flags.description: Show the Contacts tab in Settings for viewing and managing contacts

flags.label: Email Channel
flags.description: Show the Email channel card on the Contacts page and enable the email-setup skill

flags.label: App Builder Multi-file
flags.description: Enable multi-file TSX app creation with esbuild compilation instead of single-HTML apps

flags.label: Sentry Testing
flags.description: Show the Sentry Testing tab in Settings for triggering test crash reports and error events

flags.label: Mobile Pairing
flags.description: Show the Mobile (iOS) pairing card in Settings > Account

flags.label: Settings Developer Nav
flags.description: Control Developer nav visibility in macOS settings

flags.label: Logfire LLM Observability
flags.description: Enable Logfire tracing for LLM request/response telemetry when LOGFIRE_TOKEN is set
